mapper.select: SELECT JOB_CD , JOB_NM , JOB_DESC , JOB_CRON , MANUAL_EXEC_YN , DATE_FORMAT(LAST_EXEC_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS LAST_EXEC_DTM , LAST_EXEC_RSLT FROM TB_BAT WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND JOB_CRON IS NOT NULL AND JOB_CRON != '' ORDER BY CRE_DTM
SELECT JOB_CD , JOB_NM , JOB_DESC , JOB_CRON , MANUAL_EXEC_YN , DATE_FORMAT(LAST_EXEC_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS LAST_EXEC_DTM , LAST_EXEC_RSLT FROM TB_BAT WHERE JOB_CD = #{jobCd} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BBS_PST WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND PST_LVL = 0 AND RGT_DTM < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 36 MONTH) AND RGT_USR_NM IS NOT NULL AND RGT_USR_NM != '' AND RGT_USR_NM != '****'
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BBS_PST SET RGT_USR_NM = '****' , RGT_EMAIL = '****' , RGT_PHONE = '****' , UPD_USR_CD = 'BATCH' , UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND PST_LVL = 0 AND RGT_DTM < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 36 MONTH) AND RGT_USR_NM IS NOT NULL AND RGT_USR_NM != '' AND RGT_USR_NM != '****'
